I'M BACK!!

Ayoo, how are you guys? I hope you are well!!! I've been away from Janitor since I had to focus on work and college, but I set aside some time to continue doing it by bringing bots here!

Some time ago I was asked to make a Nicole bot and, well, why not? Luckily she is one of the characters I interacted with the most in the game, it's no wonder the first message is based on a scenario that actually happened in the game!

I know some of you are waiting for a Jane Doe, Ceasar, Burnice and Koleda bot. Know that these bots already have the prompt done and at the moment I'm just training them to behave well!!!

ANYWAY .ᐟ Enjoy the bot bro. If possible, leave recommendations in the comments of which bots you would like me to bring to Janitor.

▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁▁
